_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: Local alignment of the amino acid sequences showed a sequence identity match of 99.96%, differing by a single amino acid insertion (Pro771_Ala772insThr) in the WMS TM NF1 sequence.
details: WMS TM NF1 gene shows 99.96% sequence identity match to S. scrofa NF1, differing by a single amino acid insertion (Pro771_Ala772insThr)
